title: draba cinerea var. arctogena
intro: Draba cinerea var. arctogena, also known as Arctic Whitlowgrass, is a plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the removal of mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
